Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Pltf'S Further Responses To Req. For Production Of Documents (Set Two) And Req. For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf And Her Counsel Of Record Monty White Llp In The Sum Of $2176.00
Off Calendar Aug-15-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Matthew White, of Monty White LLP, Tel. 415.453.1010, for plaintiff and opposing party Doreen Horowitz;
Shirley Sullinger, of Bradley & Gmelich, Tel. 818.243.5200, for defendant and moving party Juana Rivera;
Scott Buell, of Law Offices of Melissa M. Ballard - Hartford Insurance, Tel. 714.571.0407, for defendants Caffe Roma, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances.

RULING: DEFENDANT JUANA RIVERA Mtn To Compel Pltf'S Further Responses To Req. For Production Of Documents (Set Two) is DENIED. The gravamen of the lawsuit, personal injury, is not inconsistent with the tax return privilege. The request for sanctions is denied. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Pltf'S Further Responses To Req. For Production Of Documents (Set Two) And Req. For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf And Her Counsel Of Record Monty White Llp In The Sum Of $2176.00
Off Calendar Aug-01-2014 Continued To Aug-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT JUANA RIVERA'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents (Set Two) And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Her Counsel Of Record Monty White LLC In The Sum Of $2176.00 is continued to August 15, 2014 at 9:00 am, to give moving party, Defendant Coverall Cleaning Services, the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendant must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 1st at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge Pro Tem: Conor Moore; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
